title: My $613/Month Online
author: Relative-Credit951
selftext:
Honestly, at first I thought it was a joke

A friend told me he made $2,100 in a week on a new official project, I didn’t believe him and even laughed, but later I decided to test it with a small amount, and it worked for me too, currently around +$200 per day

I know it’s not huge money, but I’m not using big amounts, and for me it’s completely decen

If you’re interested, he left a guide on his profile

His username: [HelloYouBeautiful](https://www.reddit.com/search/?q=HelloYouBeautiful&type=people&cId=bd0)

You can click it or copy and paste it into search, he’ll be the first one

comments.author: magnificox
comments.body: Alpha-reward.eth" is associated with a long-running phishing scam designed to steal Ethereum (ETH) by promising fake "web3 testing" rewards. Users are instructed to send ETH to this address, which is a scam. Always verify, never send crypto to unknown ENS names.
